creator: otis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 220398
www/osticket: new port

Hi,

plesse find the patch attached.

It brings a new port, www/osticket.

osTicket is a widely-used open source support ticket system.
It seamlessly integrates inquiries created via email,
phone and web-based forms into a simple easy-to-use
multi-user web interface.

It's written in PHP.
